issue_title: Nightly Release Failed for v0.48.0-nightly.20260618.g4d3dcdce1 on 2026-06-18
issue_body:
The nightly-release workflow failed. See the full run for details: https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli/actions/runs/27729673284

### Actions Workflow Log Output:
```text
Run ./.github/actions/npm-auth-token
Run AUTH_TOKEN="${INPUTS_GITHUB_TOKEN}"
Run npm publish \
npm error No workspaces found:
npm error   --workspace=
npm error A complete log of this run can be found in: /home/runner/.npm/_logs/2026-06-18T01_47_11_864Z-debug-0.log
Error: Process completed with exit code 1.
```
notes: Created on July 1, 2026. Note: Currently (as of July 1) the agent has no capability of opening external URL links to inspect nightly CI failure logs. Added log snippet to issue_body for now; automated CI log link scraping will be a Post-MVP feature.
golden_spec_rationale: No source files were pruned; all PR modifications directly address the reported issue.

summary.problem: The Nightly Release workflow failed during the publish step for scheduled runs because the necessary package variables were empty.
summary.root_cause: The workflow was recently changed to run in the `internal` environment rather than `prod`. The `internal` environment does not have repository variables configured for `CLI_PACKAGE_NAME`, `CORE_PACKAGE_NAME`, `A2A_PACKAGE_NAME`, `NPM_REGISTRY_PUBLISH_URL`, `NPM_REGISTRY_URL`, and `NPM_REGISTRY_SCOPE`, resulting in empty package names in `npm publish` and causing the step to fail.
summary.context: Adding default fallback values within the Actions workflow prevents the publish from failing when these environment-specific variables are missing.

steps: Under the action parameters where packages and registry details are configured, provide fallbacks using the logic-OR `||` operator in Github Actions expression syntax.

testing_strategy.expected_behavior: The workflow evaluated package variables fallback cleanly to their default values, allowing successful execution of npm publish commands even when repository parameters are empty.
verification_steps: Verify workflow syntax in `.github/workflows/release-nightly.yml` to confirm standard expression structures.
Ensure fallbacks resolve properly when corresponding `vars` are undefined.
